description: Healthcare integration platform connecting healthcare IT systems. Provides FHIR-based APIs and integration tools to connect EHRs, practice management, and other health IT systems. Focus on data interoperability.
business_model: B2B - Integration platform to healthcare organizations and vendors
competitive_advantage: General Catalyst backed, strong technical team, FHIR-native

varden_fit.rationale: Integration infrastructure - similar to Leyr, validates healthcare API market
